sections.heading: Genetic Basis
sections.content: The source does not describe the molecular pathogenesis of Soft Tissue Sarcoma. It provides limited information on the genetic basis of testicular germ cell tumors, noting that the 2016 WHO classification introduced germ cell neoplasia in situ (GCNIS) as a precursor lesion and distinguished between GCNIS-derived (postpubertal) and unrelated (prepubertal) tumors. Specific driver mutations or pathways for testicular germ cell tumors are not detailed in the provided text.
